title: Farmland To Grass
description: Use a hoe to turn farmland back into grassblocks.
body:
# Farmland To Grass

### How it works

Right click with a hoe on farmland-blocks to turn them back into grass blocks

**You only need this mod on the server side**

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xJhwZgck/images/e2612f090f560575ffdc912e09ec86f994cc0740.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xJhwZgck/images/e2612f090f560575ffdc912e09ec86f994cc0740.gif)
